ukm:Metadata.dc:title: Welfare Reform Act 2012
ukm:Metadata.dc:description: An Act to make provision for universal credit and personal independence payment; to make other provision about social security and tax credits; to make provision about the functions of the registration service, child support maintenance and the use of jobcentres; to establish the Social Mobility and Child Poverty Commission and otherwise amend the Child Poverty Act 2010; and for connected purposes.

P2para.Text: In this Part a “work search requirement” is a requirement that a claimant take—

P3para.Text: any particular action specified by the Secretary of State,

P2para.Text: for the purpose of obtaining paid work (or more paid work or better-paid work).
The Secretary of State may under subsection (1)(b) specify the time to be devoted to any particular action.
Action which may be specified under subsection (1)(b) includes in particular—

P3para.Text: creating and maintaining an online profile;
any action prescribed for the purpose in subsection (1).

P2para.Text: Regulations may impose limitations on a work search requirement by reference to the work to which it relates; and the Secretary of State may in any particular case specify further such limitations on such a requirement.
A limitation under subsection (4) may in particular be by reference to—

P3para.Text: work with a particular level of remuneration,
work available for a certain number of hours per week or at particular times,

P2para.Text: and may be indefinite or for a particular period.

Para.Text: S. 17(4)(5) in force at 25.2.2013 for specified purposes by S.I. 2013/358, art. 2(1), Sch. 1 para. 6

Pt. 1 modified by 1995 c. 18, Sch. 1 para. 2(3) (as inserted (29.4.2013) by The Universal Credit (Consequential, Supplementary, Incidental and Miscellaneous Provisions) Regulations 2013 (S.I. 2013/630), regs. 1(2), 10(b))
S. 17(1)(2) (3)(a)-(e) (4)(5) in force at 26.11.2014 for specified purposes by S.I. 2014/3094, art. 3 (with art. 6)
S. 17(1)(2) (3)(a)-(e) (4)(5) in force at 2.12.2015 for specified purposes by S.I. 2015/1930, art. 3 (with art. 7)
S. 17(1)(2) (3)(a)-(e) (4)(5) in force at 27.1.2016 and 24.2.2016 for specified purposes by S.I. 2016/33, art. 3, Sch. (with art. 7)
S. 17(1)(2) (3)(a)-(e) (4)(5) in force at 23.3.2016 and 27.4.2016 for specified purposes by S.I. 2016/407, art. 3, Sch.
S. 17(1)(2) (3)(a)-(e) (4)(5) in force at 1.2.2019 for specified purposes by S.I. 2019/167, art. 4(1)-(3) (with art. 4(4)(11))

Pts. 1, 4 modified (coming into force in accordance with art. 1 of the amending S.I.) by The Social Security (Iceland) (Liechtenstein) (Norway) (Citizens' Rights Agreement) Order 2019 (S.I. 2019/1302), art. 2; 2020 c. 1, Sch. 5 para. 1(1)

Pts. 1, 4 modified (coming into force in accordance with art. 1 of the amending S.I.) by The Social Security (Switzerland) (Citizens' Rights Agreement) Order 2019 (S.I. 2019/1303), art. 2; 2020 c. 1, Sch. 5 para. 1(1)
Pt. 1 modified (coming into force in accordance with art. 1 of the amending S.I.) by The Social Security (Ireland) Order 2019 (S.I. 2019/622), art. 2; 2020 c. 1, Sch. 5 para. 1(1)
Pt. 1 modified (1.1.2021) by The Social Security (Norway) Order 2020 (S.I. 2020/1597), arts. 1, 2(1)(2), Sch. (with art. 2(3))
Pts. 1, 4 modified (coming into force in accordance with art. 1 of the amending S.I.) by The Social Security (Switzerland) Order 2021 (S.I. 2021/1088), art. 2(1)-(3), Sch.
S. 17(1)(2), (3)(a)-(e), (4)(5) in force at 30.3.2022 in so far as not already in force by S.I. 2022/302, art. 3 (with arts. 4, 5, Sch.)
Pts. 1, 4 modified (coming into force in accordance with art. 1(3) of the amending S.I.) by The Social Security (Iceland) (Liechtenstein) (Norway) Order 2023 (S.I. 2023/1060), art. 2, Sch.
